wiki.content: "TURN UP OR DIE" is the seventh track from Jane Remover's third album Revengeseekerz (2025). It shares its name with the tour promoting the album. The song opens the second half of the album and parallels “TWICE REMOVED”, the first half’s opener and the only other song whose name is in all caps (as opposed to sentence case or lowercase like the rest of the album). As opposed to “TWICE REMOVED,” where Jane talks clearly about her current personas (Jane and venturing) as part of her, “TURN UP OR DIE” is a brash banger referencing the past personas (leroy and dltzk) that Jane killed off in a “memorial service.” (“Give dead bitches proper send-offs”) Much of Revengeseekerz deals with the idea of Jane’s personas, sampling songs from almost every alter ego Jane has and teasing another “name change” on closer and lead single “JRJRJR”. Read more on Last.fm. User-contributed text is available under the Creative Commons By-SA License; additional terms may apply.
